zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Brandon於1454年出生在英國素福爾可望福德時，她的父親Sir William Brandon30歲，母親Elizabeth Wingfield26歲。她於1475年與Sir Nicholas John Sydney of Penshurst在英國英格蘭肯特書爾斯特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她於1482年住在英國英格蘭肯特書爾斯特。她去世於1508年在英國英格蘭肯特享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Brandon于1454年出生在英国素福爾可望福德时，她的父亲Sir William Brandon30岁，母亲Elizabeth Wingfield26岁。她于1475年与Sir Nicholas John Sydney of Penshurst在英国英格兰肯特書爾斯特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她于1482年住在英国英格兰肯特書爾斯特。她去世于1508年在英国英格兰肯特享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brandon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Brandon, in Durham, Norfolk, Suffolk, Warwickshire, and elsewhere. Most are named with Old English brōm ‘broom, gorse’ + dūn ‘hill’. One in Lincolnshire, however, may be named after the Brant River, on which it stands; Ekwall derives the river name from Old English brant ‘steep’, presumably with reference to its steep banks. This surname was known in Ireland early enough to have a Gaelicized form de Breandún.
Irish (Kerry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Breandáin ‘son of Breandán’, a rare Kerry surname from the Latinized form of the name of the local saint, Brendan (Brendanus from Bréanainn).
French: from the Old French oblique case of the personal name Brando, of ancient Germanic origin (see Brand 1).

variants.name: Brand
meanings: English, Scottish, North German, Scandinavian, Dutch, and French (mainly Alsace and Lorraine): from the ancient Germanic personal name Brando, Old Norse Brandr, a short form of various compound names containing the element brand ‘sword’ (a derivative of brinnan ‘to flash’), of which the best known is Hildebrand . There is placename evidence for Brant(a) as an Old English personal name; however, the Middle English personal name Brand was probably introduced to England from Old Norse.
German: variant of   Brandt   1 and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
Swedish and Danish: ornamental name or nickname from brand ‘fire’.

variants.name: Brandom
meanings: English and Jewish (Sephardic): variant of   Brandon  .

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Brandon was born in 1454, in Wangford, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir William Brandon, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Wingfield, was 26. She married Sir Nicholas John Sydney of Penshurst in 1475, in Penshurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She lived in Penshurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom in 1482. She died in 1508, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Brandon est née en 1454, à Wangford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Brandon, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wingfield, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Nicholas John Sydney of Penshurst en 1475, à Penshurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle a vécu à Penshurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1482. Elle est décédée en 1508, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Brandon 1454 in Wangford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Brandon 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Wingfield 26. Sie hat 1475 in Penshurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom Sir Nicholas John Sydney of Penshurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1482 hat sie in Penshurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb 1508 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Brandon è nata il nel 1454 nel Wangford, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir William Brandon, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Wingfield, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Nicholas John Sydney of Penshurst nel 1475, nel Penshurst, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Penshurst, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1482. Morì nel 1508, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Brandonが1454年にイギリススフォルクワングフォードで生まれた時，父Sir William Brandonは30歳，母Elizabeth Wingfieldは26歳であった。1475年にイギリスイギリスケントペンシュルストでSir Nicholas John Sydney of Penshurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1482年にはイギリスイギリスケントペンシュルストに住んでいた。彼女は1508年にイギリスイギリスケントで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Brandon(이)가 1454년 영국 수폴크 왕퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Brandon(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Wingfield(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 펜슈르스트에서 Sir Nicholas John Sydney of Penshurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1482년도에 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 펜슈르스트에서 살았다. 그녀는 1508년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Brandon nasceu em 1454, em Wangford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Brandon, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Wingfield, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Nicholas John Sydney of Penshurst em 1475, em Penshurst, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela viveu em Penshurst, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1482. Ela faleceu em 1508, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Brandon родилась в 1454 г. в местности вангфорд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Brandon было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wingfield, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Nicholas John Sydney of Penshurst в 1475 г. в местности пеншурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она жила в местности пеншурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в 1482 году. Она умерла в 1508 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne Brandon nació en 1454, en Wangford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Brandon, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Wingfield, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Nicholas John Sydney of Penshurst en 1475, en Penshurst, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Penshurst, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1482. Murió en 1508, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
